name: Google Maps business scraper
description: Scrapes business data from Google Maps by searching via Exa for businesses in a location, scraping each result with Firecrawl for detailed info, using Claude to extract structured data (name, address, phone, hours, ratings), and saving everything to Google Sheets.

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for business search

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping business pages

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving results

searchQuery.description: Business search query (e.g. 'coffee shops in San Francisco')

maxResults.description: Maximum number of businesses to scrape

steps.name: Extract top business URL for detailed scraping
Scrape the top business result with Firecrawl
Build Claude prompt for business data extraction
Run Claude AI for business data extraction
Format business data for Google Sheets
Save business data to Google Sheets
